item.name: Auth and User
TC-001 R1 Register new user successfully
TC-002 R1 Reject duplicate username on registration

exec: pm.test('no success token returned', function () { pm.expect(body.user).to.equal(undefined); });

item.name: TC-003 R1 Reject duplicate email on registration

exec: pm.test('no success token returned', function () { pm.expect(body.user).to.equal(undefined); });

item.name: TC-004 R2 Login with valid credentials
TC-005 R2 Reject invalid login credentials
TC-006 R2 Reject malformed login payload
TC-008 R3 Reject current user access without token
TC-007 R3 Get current user with valid token

exec: pm.test('authorized current user succeeds', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('current user matches registration email', function () { pm.expect(body.user.email).to.eql(pm.environment.get('EMAIL')); });

item.name: TC-009 R3 Update current user and persist supported fields
Articles and Social
TC-010 R4 Create article successfully
TC-011 R4 Reject malformed article payload
TC-012 R5 Allow article owner to update own article
Bootstrap second user for ownership checks
Login second user and remember token

exec: pm.test('second user login succeeds', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

item.name: TC-013 R5 Forbid non-owner article mutation
TC-014 R5 Return not found for missing article slug mutation

exec: pm.test('missing slug returns not found', function () { pm.expect([404]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-015 R6 Toggle follow state with auth
TC-016 R6 Reject follow without auth

exec: pm.test('missing auth follow rejected', function () { pm.expect([401, 403]).to.include(pm.response.code); });

item.name: TC-017 R7 Filter articles with valid pagination bounds
TC-018 R7 Reject invalid pagination bounds
Comments
TC-019 R8 Create and delete own comment successfully
TC-020 R8 Enforce comment ownership and missing-resource errors
TC-019 R8 Delete own comment successfully
TC-020 R8 Missing comment resource returns not found

description.content: Generated from docs/member3/generated-blackbox-output-v1.md and aligned with SKILL2. Covers RealWorld API cases R1-R8 with traceable request names.
